about.title: About Us
about.lead: Where medical excellence meets the warmth every child deserves — in the heart of Botad.
about.paragraph1: At Shivam Children Hospital, we believe that every child deserves care that is not only medically sound but also filled with warmth, compassion, and hope. Since the day we opened our doors in Botad, our mission has been simple yet powerful — to stand beside families during their most important moments and provide healthcare they can trust with their hearts.
about.paragraph2: For parents, nothing matters more than the well-being of their child. We understand the fear, the worry, and the sleepless nights that come with illness. That is why our hospital was built not just as a medical facility, but as a place where families feel supported, heard, and cared for. Every child who enters our hospital is treated with the same love and attention we would give our own.
about.paragraph3: Our experienced pediatric specialist, dedicated nurses, and support staff work together to create an environment where healing feels natural and comforting. From newborn care and vaccinations to emergency support and general treatment, we ensure that every service reflects our commitment to safety, empathy, and excellence.
about.paragraph4: As an Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY) empanelled hospital, we proudly extend quality healthcare to families who need it most, ensuring that financial limitations never stand in the way of a child's treatment.
about.paragraph5: Over the years, Shivam Children Hospital has grown into a trusted name in Botad and surrounding regions — not because of our infrastructure alone, but because of the relationships we've built with the community. Parents come to us with confidence, and children leave with smiles. That is the true measure of our success.
about.paragraph6: At our core, we are more than a hospital. We are a family dedicated to protecting the health, happiness, and future of every child who walks through our doors.
about.pmjayTitle: Ayushman Bharat — care for every family
about.locationNote: Shivam Children Hospital, Bharat society, Paliyad Rd, Botad, Gujarat 364710, India

doctor.name: Dr. Jignesh D. Vaghela
doctor.bio: Dr. Vaghela leads Shivam Children Hospital with expertise in newborn intensive care, serious childhood illness, and long-term pediatric follow-up. Families across Botad rely on his guidance for both routine check-ups and critical care decisions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common questions about our services and policies.
faq.q1: What are the hospital consulting hours?
faq.a1: Our outpatient department (OPD) is open Monday to Friday from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM & 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM, and Saturday from 10:00 AM to 1:00 PM & 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM. The hospital is closed on Sundays, except for emergencies.
faq.q2: What specialized facilities are available for critical newborns?
faq.a2: We feature a Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) and Pediatric Intensive Care Unit (PICU) equipped with CPAP respiratory support, phototherapy units, central oxygen systems, and precise monitoring devices managed by our neonatology team.
faq.q3: How can I contact the hospital for emergency cases?
faq.a3: For pediatric emergencies, you can call us directly on our dedicated helplines at +91 78782 82866 or 02849 231444. Our emergency team is prepared to receive critical cases.
